query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_events, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'check_in' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as check_ins,
       SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'check_out' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as check_outs
FROM attendance_events;
